---
title: CLI Help
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
  comment: ""
---

```{r}
#| label: setup-cli-help
#| include: false
yamark_bin <- Sys.getenv("YAMARK_BIN", unset = "")
if (!nzchar(yamark_bin)) {
  status <- system2("cargo", c("build", "--manifest-path", "../Cargo.toml"))
  if (!identical(status, 0L)) {
    stop("`cargo build` failed with status ", status, call. = FALSE)
  }

  yamark_exe <- if (.Platform$OS.type == "windows") "yamark.exe" else "yamark"
  yamark_bin <- file.path("..", "target", "debug", yamark_exe)
}

yamark_help <- function(...) {
  args <- c(..., "--help")
  old_options <- options(cli.num_colors = 256L)
  on.exit(options(old_options), add = TRUE)

  output <- system2(
    yamark_bin,
    args,
    stdout = TRUE,
    stderr = TRUE,
    env = c("CLICOLOR_FORCE=1", "CLICOLOR=1")
  )
  status <- attr(output, "status")

  if (!is.null(status)) {
    stop(
      "`", yamark_bin, " ", paste(args, collapse = " "), "` failed with status ", status,
      call. = FALSE
    )
  }

  output <- sub("[ \t]+$", "", output, perl = TRUE)
  output <- htmltools::htmlEscape(output)
  output <- fansi::sgr_to_html(output, term.cap = "256")
  knitr::asis_output(paste0(
    "<pre class=\"yamark-cli-help\"><code>",
    paste(output, collapse = "\n"),
    "</code></pre>\n"
  ))
}
```

## `yamark`

```{r}
#| label: help-yamark
#| results: asis
yamark_help()
```

## `yamark format`

```{r}
#| label: help-yamark-format
#| results: asis
yamark_help("format")
```

## `yamark git-filter`

```{r}
#| label: help-yamark-git-filter
#| results: asis
yamark_help("git-filter")
```
